compiled_state.title: Tier B: leaf-write commands ported to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Tier B of the bash->Python strangler-fig (story adult-oxide-slave, docs/bash-migration.md §4). Port leaf-write command bodies out of bash (ticket-lib-api.sh / ticket-*.sh) into rebar._commands, behind the REBAR_LEAF_WRITES kill-switch, reusing the existing rebar._engine_support.resolver and the event-append seam. Default stays bash until parity-green + dogfood soak.

## What
- Foundation: ticket-append-event.sh seam (one locked write path wrapping write_commit_event), rebar._switch (REBAR_LEAF_WRITES parsing, REBAR_PUSH idiom), rebar._commands package.
- Per command (comment, tag/untag, set-file-impact, set-verify-commands, archive, then create/edit/link/unlink/revert): characterize -> port -> switch-in at dispatcher + library/MCP -> dual-run the bash suite against BOTH impls byte-identically.

## Scope
Leaf writes only; transition/claim/reopen keep ticket_txn.py. No store/schema/lock-design change. Flip/soak/retire are later, separate-release steps.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-append-event.sh seam in place; all Python writes route through it (I5 single locked write path preserved)
- [ ] rebar._switch resolves REBAR_LEAF_WRITES with the REBAR_PUSH idiom (case-insensitive, default bash, typo-tolerant)
- [ ] Each leaf command ported to rebar._commands and switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Each command's bash suite passes against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python (dual-run parity)
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Foundation + first ports landed in 671be954. Done: rebar._switch (kill-switch single source of truth), ticket-append-event.sh (the one locked write seam wrapping write_commit_event, I5 preserved), rebar._commands package, and the pure single-event appends comment/set-file-impact/set-verify-commands — ported, switch-wired at dispatcher + library, dual-run green (bash AND python, byte-identical) on their 3 bash suites; new test_leaf_writes_parity.py (switch-resolution + library in-process parity); interfaces tier 224 green; default stays bash. Remaining leaf writes spawned as children: rely-suede-chase (tag/untag), peak-fawn-bug (archive), slum-visor-snail (create/edit/link/unlink/revert), bored-nape-kin (flip+soak+retire).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: PORTING COMPLETE. All 11 leaf-write commands ported to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library/MCP, each dual-run parity-green (bash AND python, byte-identical): comment, set-file-impact, set-verify-commands, tag, untag, archive, create, edit, link, unlink, revert. Foundation: ticket-append-event.sh seam (I5 preserved), rebar._switch (single-source switch parse). Validation: every command's bash suite green both impls (comment 13, file-impact 22, verify 18, tag 9, archive suites 9/6/15/13, create 56, edit 48, link 66/4/23/2, revert via id-resolution 41 + bridge-e2e 23); interfaces tier 240 green incl. 32 new parity tests; reducer revert tests green. Default STAYS bash. Commits: 671be954 (foundation+comment/fi/vc), tag, archive, 2f54256f (create), edit, link, unlink, revert. The four AC for porting are met. Remaining Tier B = bored-nape-kin (flip default->python, one-release dogfood soak, then retire switch+bash+suites) — release-gated, NOT doable in-session without a real soak. Keeping this umbrella in_progress until that lands.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Dogfood soak ENABLED in joe's local checkout: pipx editable install (on-PATH rebar now runs the working tree) + REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=python via .claude/settings.local.json. This comment was written through the Python leaf-write path against the live tickets store.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: TIER B COMPLETE. All children closed: rely-suede-chase (tag/untag), peak-fawn-bug (archive), slum-visor-snail (create/edit/link/unlink/revert), bored-nape-kin (flip+soak+retire). Python is the sole leaf-write impl; switch + 9 bash leaf functions deleted (ticket-lib-api.sh 2367->1109). Commits 671be954..845a220d. Closing the Tier B umbrella.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
